reason: Verify TypeScript/runtime test coverage and no generated dist or SDK contract leakage.
Check auth/refresh/provider failures normalize into structured failures.
Check output/events/status never expose token-like credential material.
Check workbench controller and selector state stay typed and exhaustive.
Check CLI/workbench/model registry/host factory all consume one auth-aware view.
Check AI SDK bridge remains adapter-only and core contracts stay SDK-neutral.
